retry_reason: dev_kfree_skb_any is a void function that always succeeds in decrementing the refcount; the skb may be freed, and retrying would be a use-after-free.
contract_summary: This function is a put wrapper that releases the caller's reference to an sk_buff by calling dev_kfree_skb_any. After this function returns, the caller must not access the skb, as it may have been freed if the refcount dropped to zero. The function passes ownership of the skb to the network stack's buffer management. There is no error path or conditional logic; the put operation is unconditional.
